message:
🌱 Replace raw button elements with shared Button component in AlertBadge (#2342)

Replace all 10 raw <button> elements in AlertBadge.tsx with the shared
<Button> component to improve consistency across the codebase. Uses
appropriate variant (ghost/accent) and size (sm) props, with className
overrides for custom color states (severity filters, acknowledge button).

Partial fix for #2323.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
